summary: Tested grades blocking rules for enrollment/transfer dates. Backend API (13/15 tests passed) correctly returns blocked_before_enrollment and blocked_after_action arrays. Frontend loads without errors but UI testing was limited due to multi-grade class filtering complexity.

minor.issue: Secretario credentials (secretario@sigesc.com / secretario123) returned 401 - credentials may be incorrect

action_items: Verify secretario credentials - current ones (secretario@sigesc.com / secretario123) return 401
Consider adding data-testid attributes to grade input fields for easier UI testing
critical_code_review_comments: Backend grades.py (lines 138-311): Correctly builds enrollment_dates dict from both active and inactive enrollments
Backend grades.py (lines 281-290): Correctly calculates blocked_before_enrollment (bimestre ends before enrollment_date) and blocked_after_action (bimestre starts after action_date)

Frontend Grades.js (lines 362-378): canEditStudentGrade function correctly implements blocking rules - blocked_after_action blocks ALL users, blocked_before_enrollment blocks only non-admin/secretario

success_rate.backend: 87% (13/15 tests passed, 1 failed due to credentials, 1 skipped)
success_rate.frontend: Page loads correctly, API integration working (5 items returned)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test class c09b8666-c8bb-40d1-b835-c2b0fa4b8ecd (TURMA MULTI 1-2-3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grades blocking rules tested. Backend API correctly returns blocked_before_enrollment and blocked_after_action arrays. Test class c09b8666-c8bb-40d1-b835-c2b0fa4b8ecd has 5 students with various blocking states. Use academic_year=2026 for testing. Frontend multi-grade class requires selecting Ano/Série before component. Secretario credentials need verification.
